summary.en: As high-quality human text gets exhausted, synthetic data pipelines with iterative correction are becoming standard. The key challenge is retaining diversity while avoiding recursive degradation.
summary.zh: 随着高质量人类文本逐渐耗尽，带有迭代纠错的合成数据流水线正成为常态。关键挑战是既保持多样性，又避免递归训练带来的退化。

observations.en: Self-rewarding loops are improving reasoning scores in controlled settings.
observations.zh: 自奖励循环在受控场景中持续提升推理表现。

observations.en: Recursive synthetic training still carries model-collapse risk without strict curation.
observations.zh: 若缺少严格筛选，递归式合成训练仍有模型坍塌风险。

observations.en: Human-in-the-loop review remains the strongest quality differentiator.
observations.zh: 人类参与审校仍是数据质量最强的区分因素。

quote.en: When we run out of historical data, we must design how to learn from what we generate.
quote.zh: 当历史数据趋于枯竭，我们必须设计如何从自生成内容中继续学习。

title.zh: 论文：LLM 中的自我纠错
